title: ReadResult - Metadata API
description: Contains result information for the readMetadata call.

records.description: An array of metadata components returned from readMetadata().

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="ReadResult">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="records" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:Metadata"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```
